name: ddl-sql-generator
description: Implement SQL string generation functions to convert DDLOutput structures into executable CREATE TABLE and ALTER TABLE statements
acceptanceCriteria: columnDefToSQL(column, isPrimaryKey, dialect) converts ColumnDef to column definition string
tableDefToCreateTableSQL(table, dialect) converts TableDef to CREATE TABLE string with proper formatting
foreignKeyDefToSQL(fk, dialect) converts ForeignKeyDef to ALTER TABLE (PostgreSQL) or inline comment (SQLite)
ddlOutputToSQL(ddl, dialect) orchestrates complete DDL generation in execution order
All identifiers properly escaped using dialect.escapeIdentifier()
CHECK constraints formatted correctly with proper quoting
Composite primary keys supported for junction tables
PostgreSQL: Generates ALTER TABLE statements for foreign keys
SQLite: Generates inline FK syntax as comments
All statements end with semicolon (except SQLite comments)
generateSQL(schema, dialect) convenience function added to index.ts
Barrel exports updated to include sql-generator functions
JSDoc documentation for all exported functions
